title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 486.675 - Nonattorney notaries, prohibited acts
text:
486.675.  Nonattorney notaries, prohibited acts. — 1.  A notary who is not an attorney shall not assist another person in drafting, completing, selecting, or understanding a document or transaction requiring a notarial act.
  2.  Subsection 1 of this section shall not preclude a notary who is duly qualified, trained, licensed, or experienced in a particular industry or professional field from selecting, drafting, completing, or advising on a document or certificate related to a matter within that industry or field.
(L. 2020 H.B. 1655)
